# Loupe

Loupe is an open-source, local Windows AI website builder and web-design studio: AI agents build real websites and you refine them at Figma grade directly on the live page, with every visual edit verified against the real browser render. Bring your own API keys or the AI subscriptions you already pay for. MIT-licensed.

## Links
- Website: https://winchxyz.github.io/loupe-website/
- Features: https://winchxyz.github.io/loupe-website/features.html
- Prompt gallery: https://winchxyz.github.io/loupe-website/gallery.html
- Download (Windows): https://winchxyz.github.io/loupe-website/download.html
- FAQ: https://winchxyz.github.io/loupe-website/faq.html
- Source & README: https://github.com/winchxyz/loupe
- Releases: https://github.com/winchxyz/loupe/releases/latest
- License: MIT (https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

## Notes
Windows 10/11 (64-bit) desktop app (Electron). Build engines: Claude API, OpenRouter/OpenAI/Gemini/xAI keys, or CLI subscriptions (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Copilot). Keys stored locally, sent only to the matching provider. Early v0.1, solo-built, maintained in the open.
